name: Cheesy Tuna Rice Muffins
recipeIngredient: 6.5 ounces drained white tuna in water
recipeInstructions:
Tangy Butter Sauce
1/4 cup melted butter
1 tablespoon lemon juice
1/2 teaspoon seasoned salt
1/2 teaspoon dried parsley
Note: I have always used leftover cooked Rice-a-Roni.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Combine rice, cheese, tuna, olives, onion, parsley, and seasoned salt. Stir in eggs and milk, mixing thoroughly. Spray muffin tin with PAM. Divide the rice mixture evenly among the cups. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
Meanwhile, combine sauce ingredients. Loosen muffins with a spatula and serve with sauce.
